title: Hero Animations
description: Share a widget between two screens with a smooth Hero transition.
problemStatement:
Hero animations connect screens! Wrap an `Icon(Icons.person, size: 50)` in a `Hero` widget with the tag `'profile-pic'`. 

**Requirement:** When navigating to the second screen, use the same `Hero` widget and tag for an `Icon(Icons.person, size: 150)`.
hints: The `tag` must be identical on both screens for the animation to work.
expectedOutput: The person icon grows smoothly as you move between screens.
